b:include.data: { image: data:image, altText: data:blog.title.escaped, originalWidth: data:width, originalHeight: data:height }
b:include.name: responsiveImage

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: I'm a video editor passionate about creating clean, cinematic, and engaging videos. I specialize in reels, commercials, and brand content with a focus on storytelling, smooth edits, color grading, and motion graphics.
